subcodes.first_line: O true servant of the Blessed Beauty! Though until now I have not corresponded with thee, yet in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حقیقی جمال مبارک هر چند تا بحال با تو مکاتبه ننمودم ولی در جمیع احوال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
